title: Nizam Durable Run State Schema
description: Validates .agent/run_state.json, the single source of truth for an execution engine's current position in a phase: active feature, status, scope budget, circuit breaker counters, and history. Tolerates the forward-looking optional fields ('active_contract_id', 'completed_contract_ids', 'blocked_features', 'last_action') documented by the Execution Engine protocol's durable-state update table without requiring them, so both the current live shape and the protocol-documented forward shape validate.

repository.description: Name of the repository this run state belongs to.

current_phase.description: Id of the phase currently active.

current_feature.description: Id of the feature currently active, or null when the phase is complete.

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the run.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last update to this file.

scope_budget.description: Line-count tracking for the Scope Budget Protocol.

circuit_breaker.description: Attempt counters keyed by step id, enforcing the mandatory 3-strike circuit breaker.

history.description: Append-only log of significant run events.

active_contract_id.description: Id of the contract currently authorizing implementation, or null when none is active.

completed_contract_ids.description: Ids of contracts that have been fully implemented.

blocked_features.description: Ids of features that are currently blocked.

last_action.description: Short description of the most recent action taken against this run state.
